description: borough of New York City, New York, United States
description_wiki: The Bronx ( BRONKS) is the northernmost of the five boroughs of New York City, coextensive with Bronx County, in the U.S. state of New York.
Poland, officially the Republic of Poland, is a country in Central Europe.

aliases: The town of Our Lady the Queen of the Angels of the Little Portion
description: seat of Los Angeles County, and largest city in California, United States
description_wiki: Los Angeles (often referred to by its initials, LA) is the most populous city in the U.S. state of California, and the commercial, financial, and cultural center of Southern California.

aliases: University of California at Los Angeles
State Normal School at Los Angeles
description: public university in Los Angeles, California, USA
description_wiki: The University of California, Los Angeles (UCLA) is a public land-grant research university in the Westwood neighborhood of Los Angeles, California, United States.
The Great Depression was a severe global economic downturn from 1929 to 1939.

description: economic programs of U.S. president Franklin D. Roosevelt
description_wiki: The New Deal was a 1933–1938 series of economic, social, and political reforms in response to the Great Depression in the United States under President Franklin D. Roosevelt.

description: social organization that promotes womens' emancipation, leadership and rights
description_wiki: The Young Women's Christian Association (YWCA) is a nonprofit organization with a focus on empowerment, leadership, and rights of women, young women, and girls in more than 100 countries.
C. Aubrey Grossman (1911 – December 8, 1999) was an American attorney during the Civil rights movement, notably defending Willie McGee.

aliases: Columbia University in the City of New York
description: private university in New York City, New York, US
description_wiki: Columbia University in the City of New York, commonly referred to as Columbia University, is a private Ivy League research university in New York City, United States.

description: war between the Republicans and the Nationalists in Spain from 1936 to 1939
description_wiki: The Spanish Civil War (Spanish: La guerra civil española) was fought from 1936 to 1939 between the Republicans and the Nationalist rebels.
